name: Butter Tart Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a bowl, whisk together sugar and softened butter until well combined.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla extract.
4. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt until just mixed.
5. Spoon batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Let cool completely before serving.
